response.justification: Bogdan has extensive full-stack experience with TypeScript, React, Node.js, and databases (including PostgreSQL alternatives), but his recent career gap and lack of direct exposure to renewable energy/construction technology may require additional evaluation. His pragmatic approach to architecture, scalability, and team collaboration aligns well with the role's requirements.
strengths: Strong TypeScript and full-stack development background with diverse tech stack experience
Proven ability to build scalable systems (e.g., Direct Mail automation platform handling millions of operations)
Experience with modern web frameworks (React, Ember.js) and clean architecture principles
concerns: Recent career gap (since October 2025) with no active project details provided
Lack of direct experience in renewable energy/construction technology domains
Overqualified for an entry-level role; may seek higher compensation or responsibility
